framework.name: OAuth 2.0 Assumes Deterministic Clients
framework.description: The paper's core thesis: OAuth 2.0's client model breaks under stochastic LLM reasoning, prompt injection, and multi-agent orchestration because privileges can silently expand without the token framework detecting it.
framework.raw_quote: OAuth 2.0 assumes deterministic clients, but in agentic settings stochastic reasoning, prompt injection, or multi-agent orchestration can silently expand privileges.

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
